title: Review of Civil Legal Aid: Data Publications Overview Report
body: "This report is part of the Review’s data publication series. It summarises key descriptive information about solicitors, solicitor firms and barristers who work on civil legal aid. It highlights changes in the market composition and demographics over time. The report does not draw any conclusions from the data shown.  This analysis combines administrative data held by the Legal Aid Agency with the results of 2 data matching exercises: one between the MOJ and The Law Society, relating to solicitors and solicitor firms doing civil legal aid, and the second between the MOJ and the Bar Council, relating to barristers doing civil legal aid. "
